cases: qualified: includes edge phrase, trust, score, and target
qualified: SGO edge source produces SGO label
suppressed: no reasons falls back to score line
narrative is always a non-empty string

acceptance_criteria.per_pick_explanations_from_real_inputs: generatePickNarrative() derives output entirely from PickNarrativeInput — score, breakdown, edgeSource, suppressionReasons
acceptance_criteria.concise_specific_traceable: 1-3 sentence output, every sentence maps 1:1 to a signal value
acceptance_criteria.market_vs_matchup_reasons: edgeSourceQuality distinguishes market-backed vs explicit vs confidence-derived
acceptance_criteria.no_hallucination: Pure template logic — no AI generation, no LLM calls, deterministic output

wiring.service_integration: apps/api/src/promotion-service.ts payload.narrative field populated on every promotion decision
